questions.question: Describe the main elements of the framework of reinforcement learning, including the agent, environment, states, actions, rewards, and policy. What is the relationship between the agent's policy and the value function?
questions.hint: The framework of reinforcement learning is based on Markov Decision Processes (MDPs)

questions.question: Explain the difference between the Markov Decision Process (MDP) and the Markov Decision Process with discounted rewards. How do the types of rewards affect the learning process?
questions.hint: Consider the discount factor in the MDP with discounted rewards

questions.question: What is the main difference between the Q-learning algorithm and the policy-gradient algorithm? Provide an example to illustrate the difference between the two.
questions.hint: Focus on the learning rate and policy update
